data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of skipping individual occurrences, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the ability to skip specific dates, but there is no concrete evidence or API endpoints that demonstrate this capability. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not support the validation of the 'skip individual occurrences' feature.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the ability to skip individual occurrences.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to validate skipping occurrences
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows skipping individual occurrences of the subscription.
